text:
# Generative AI at Nationwide – Partnership  
9  
Nationwide and IBM confidential   |    © 2024 IBM Corporation  
Over the last year, our joint Nationwide & IBM teams have successfully defined how AI will be put to work safely and responsibly at Nationwide, built generative AI muscle through the POC experiments and begun setting up the foundations for accelerated delivery and governance.  
| Aug 24   | Sep 24   | Oct 24   | Nov 24   | Dec 24   | Jan 25   | Feb 25   | Mar 25   | Apr 25   | May 25   | Jun 25   | Jul 25   |
|----------|----------|----------|----------|----------|----------|----------|----------|----------|----------|----------|----------|  
QA-AI Assist POC  
Pilot Rollout  
Complaints Pilot go-Live  
Complaints onboarding new journeys  
Scale out  
GenAI Platform Federation – API Management + Consumers + Governance (WatsonX.gov)  
Other x n use cases  
Integration with Lakehouse, Solution Accelerators, Agentic workflows, Small Language Model

name: Chunk 6/7

raw_entities.name: Nationwide
raw_entities.description: A major financial services organization and the primary client for the generative AI partnership initiative. The document outlines a multi-month roadmap for deploying AI solutions safely and responsibly across customer, colleague, and IT operations domains.
context: our joint Nationwide & IBM teams have successfully defined how AI will be put to work safely and responsibly at Nationwide

raw_entities.name: IBM
raw_entities.description: The technology and consulting partner collaborating with Nationwide on a joint generative AI delivery and governance program. IBM provides the underlying platforms, accelerators, and AI workforce to support the client's transformation.
context: our joint Nationwide & IBM teams have successfully defined

raw_entities.name: Generative AI
raw_entities.description: The core strategic offering being deployed across Nationwide's operations. The solution encompasses a suite of AI-driven capabilities, platforms, and use cases designed to modernize workflows, enhance customer experience, and improve operational efficiency.
context: how AI will be put to work safely and responsibly at Nationwide
built generative AI muscle through the POC experiments

raw_entities.name: GenAI Platform Federation
raw_entities.description: A centralized governance and delivery architecture enabling scalable AI consumption. It integrates API management, consumer access controls, and governance frameworks to ensure secure and compliant AI deployment across the enterprise.
context: GenAI Platform Federation – API Management + Consumers + Governance (WatsonX.gov)
begun setting up the foundations for accelerated delivery and governance

raw_entities.name: WatsonX.gov
raw_entities.description: IBM's enterprise governance and risk management platform integrated into the GenAI Federation. It provides the controls, auditing, and compliance frameworks necessary to deploy AI safely and responsibly at scale.
context: GenAI Platform Federation – API Management + Consumers + Governance (WatsonX.gov)

raw_entities.name: Watsonx Assistant v2
raw_entities.description: The second version of IBM's conversational AI platform, positioned as a key delivery vehicle for customer and colleague-facing generative AI applications within the Nationwide ecosystem.

raw_entities.name: FIGMA Code Converter
raw_entities.description: An AI-powered development tool used to translate FIGMA design prototypes into functional React code. It accelerates front-end development and reduces manual coding effort for UI/UX modernization.

raw_entities.name: Cobol IQP+
raw_entities.description: A specialized testing and quality assurance tool focused on legacy COBOL systems. It is being piloted to validate testing workflows and support modernization efforts for older application codebases.

raw_entities.name: Lakehouse
raw_entities.description: A modern data architecture combining data warehousing and data lake capabilities. It serves as the foundational data layer for integrating AI workloads, accelerators, and agentic workflows.
context: Integration with Lakehouse, Solution Accelerators, Agentic workflows, Small Language Model

raw_entities.name: Agentic Workflows
raw_entities.description: The ability to deploy autonomous AI agents that execute multi-step business processes without constant human intervention. Integrated with the Lakehouse and solution accelerators to drive end-to-end automation.
context: Integration with Lakehouse, Solution Accelerators, Agentic workflows, Small Language Model

raw_entities.name: Documents Intelligence
raw_entities.description: An AI-driven capability for extracting, classifying, and analyzing unstructured document data. It supports downstream use cases such as complaints processing and transcript analysis.

raw_entities.name: Governance
raw_entities.description: The operational and compliance framework ensuring AI solutions are deployed safely, responsibly, and in alignment with regulatory standards. Central to the GenAI Platform Federation and WatsonX.gov integration.
context: how AI will be put to work safely and responsibly at Nationwide
GenAI Platform Federation – API Management + Consumers + Governance (WatsonX.gov)
foundations for accelerated delivery and governance

raw_entities.name: Complaints Management
raw_entities.description: A customer-facing application where AI is used to streamline, analyze, and resolve customer complaints. The use case involves onboarding new digital journeys and scaling AI-driven support workflows.

raw_entities.name: Fraud Analysis
raw_entities.description: An operational use case leveraging AI to identify, investigate, and mitigate fraudulent activities. Positioned as a key consumer of the generative AI platform within IT and security operations.

raw_entities.name: Call Transcript Analysis
raw_entities.description: A data-driven use case that processes recorded customer interactions to extract insights, improve service quality, and support compliance auditing. Serves as a primary data source for AI model training and governance.

raw_entities.name: Code Modernisation
raw_entities.description: A development use case that converts legacy or prototype FIGMA designs into production-ready React code. It accelerates UI development cycles and reduces manual engineering effort.

raw_entities.name: Legacy System Testing
raw_entities.description: A quality assurance use case focused on validating legacy COBOL applications. The pilot rollout of Cobol IQP+ ensures system reliability and compliance before broader deployment or modernization.

raw_entities.name: Safe and Responsible AI Deployment
raw_entities.description: A strategic outcome ensuring that AI initiatives are implemented with appropriate safeguards, ethical standards, and regulatory compliance. Mitigates operational and reputational risks associated with generative AI adoption.
context: how AI will be put to work safely and responsibly at Nationwide

raw_entities.name: Accelerated Delivery
raw_entities.description: An operational benefit achieved through established governance foundations and platform federation. Enables faster rollout of AI use cases, pilots, and production deployments across customer, colleague, and IT domains.
context: foundations for accelerated delivery and governance

raw_entities.name: POC Experiments
raw_entities.description: The initial experimental phase where joint teams tested generative AI capabilities to build foundational knowledge and validate technical approaches. Served as the catalyst for scaling and governance setup.
context: built generative AI muscle through the POC experiments

raw_entities.name: Pilot Rollout
raw_entities.description: A controlled deployment event marking the transition from proof-of-concept to early production use. Applied across multiple workstreams including complaints, code conversion, and legacy testing.

raw_entities.name: Complaints Pilot Go-Live
raw_entities.description: A specific milestone event marking the operational launch of the AI-driven complaints management use case. Represents a key step in scaling generative AI across customer-facing journeys.

properties.scope: safe and responsible AI deployment across multiple use cases
API Management, Consumer integration, and Governance

properties.key_characteristics: enables governance and API management for GenAI platform federation
AI assistant for customer and colleague interactions
converts Figma designs to React code
testing and modernization for COBOL systems
unified data architecture for AI and analytics workloads

properties.what_it_does: enables autonomous AI task execution and process automation
properties.differentiating_aspect: leverages small language models for efficient, targeted automation

properties.what_it_does: extracts and analyzes information from unstructured documents
ensures safe, responsible, and compliant AI deployment and usage
properties.differentiating_aspect: built-in safety and responsibility framework for enterprise AI

properties.problem_context: handling customer complaints efficiently and accurately
properties.approach: AI-driven pilot rollout and journey onboarding
properties.outcome_achieved: pilot go-live and new journey onboarding

properties.problem_context: analyzing customer service call recordings for insights
properties.outcome_achieved: AI assistant deployment for transcript analysis

properties.problem_context: modernizing legacy codebases and design-to-code workflows

properties.outcome_achieved: POC completion and deployment of testing tools

properties.problem_context: testing and validating legacy COBOL systems

properties.description: ensures AI is deployed and operated within safe, responsible, and governed boundaries
enables faster scaling and deployment of AI solutions post-pilot

relationships.description: Established a confidential joint partnership to co-develop and deploy AI solutions.
Actively deploying and operationalizing generative AI across its operations.
relationships.context: how AI will be put to work safely and responsibly at Nationwide

relationships.description: Delivers secure, governed AI operations aligned with enterprise risk standards.
relationships.context: defined how AI will be put to work safely and responsibly at Nationwide

relationships.description: Enables faster time-to-value through established foundational AI capabilities.
relationships.context: begun setting up the foundations for accelerated delivery

relationships.description: Validated core generative AI capabilities and built organizational AI readiness.
relationships.context: built generative AI muscle through the POC experiments

relationships.description: Incorporates enterprise-grade governance as a core platform component.
relationships.context: GenAI Platform Federation – API Management + Consumers + Governance

relationships.description: Leverages the government-cloud variant of WatsonX for secure AI infrastructure.
Connects with autonomous workflow orchestration to enable multi-step AI tasks.
Consumes and processes data directly from the enterprise lakehouse architecture.
Provides automated extraction and analysis of unstructured document data.
Leverages AI to streamline complaint handling and onboard new customer journeys.
Marked the successful production launch of AI-driven complaints handling.
Applies generative AI to detect and analyze fraudulent patterns.
Utilizes AI to process and extract insights from customer call recordings.
Employs FIGMA tools to automate React code conversion and modernize legacy UIs.
Deploys Cobol IQP+ to validate and test legacy COBOL-based systems.
Powers AI-assisted complaint resolution and QA workflows.
Provides and co-delivers the generative AI platform and associated technologies.
Represents the broader scaling phase of AI capabilities across multiple use cases.
Adopting the federated platform to standardize API management and consumer governance.
relationships.context: GenAI Platform Federation – API Management + Consumers + Governance
